scripts.d:build:test: pnpm --filter web-app build:d && pnpm --filter desktop-app build:win:test

scripts-info.update:wails: Updates the Wails V3 CLI to the latest version (including pre releases versions).
scripts-info.wails:dev: Starts the wails v3 dev server for the desktop application.
scripts-info.d:build:test: TEST ONLY: build frontend and then run wails build for windows using console mode with devtools enabled.
scripts-info.fe:dev: Starts the vite dev server for the web application.
scripts-info.cloc: Counts the lines of code in the project using cloc, excluding files tracked by git.
